102	/**
103	 * Get all course IDs where a user is an instructor
104	 */
105	export async function getInstructorCourseIds(payload: Payload, userId: string): Promise<string[]> {
106	  const assignments = await payload.find({
107	    collection: 'course-instructors',
108	    where: {
109	      instructor: { equals: userId },
110	    },
111	    limit: 100,
112	    overrideAccess: true,
113	  })
114	  return assignments.docs.map((doc) => doc.course as string)
115	}
